tasks.title: Plugin Initialization and Structure Setup
tasks.description: Create the basic plugin structure with main file, readme, and directory organization following WordPress plugin standards.
tasks.completionNotes: Main plugin file, loader, i18n, activator/deactivator, helpers, admin/public/settings classes all in place. Proper constants, hooks, and directory structure.

tasks.title: Database Schema Creation
tasks.description: Create the pizzapilot_order_slots database table for storing time slot information.
tasks.completionNotes: wp_pizzapilot_order_slots table created via dbDelta on activation. Schema: slot_id, date, start_time, end_time, availability, order_id, created_at, updated_at with proper indexes.

tasks.title: Admin Settings Panel
tasks.description: Create a tabbed admin settings page with General, Delivery, and Advanced tabs using WordPress Settings API.
tasks.completionNotes: 3-tab settings page (General, Delivery, Advanced). Enable toggle, delivery postcode/radius/unit, start/end times. Pro extensibility via hooks (pizzapilot_settings_tabs, pizzapilot_settings_sections, pizzapilot_register_pro_settings, etc.).

tasks.title: Time Slot Management Interface
tasks.description: Admin page for CRUD operations on delivery time slots.
tasks.notes: Currently only available via Pro's Order Slots tab. Free version needs its own basic slot management UI for creating same-day slots.

tasks.title: Time Slot Selection at Checkout
tasks.description: Implement time slot selection on WooCommerce checkout (both classic and block checkout).
tasks.completionNotes: Registered via woocommerce_register_additional_checkout_field. Supports both classic and WC Blocks checkout. Delivery type (delivery/collect) + delivery time select. Validation includes elapsed slot check (20-min cutoff). Order meta saved to both WC additional fields and legacy meta keys.

tasks.title: Pizza Quantity Deduction Logic
tasks.description: Count items in order and deduct from slot availability.
tasks.completionNotes: Free version provides count_order_items() with pizzapilot_order_item_count filter. Pro's Pizzapilot_Pro_Capacity hooks into this for per_order/per_category countdown modes. Seat-based booking via pizzapilot_slot_booked action. Double-booking guard (_pizzapilot_slot_booking_processed meta flag) prevents both classic+block hooks from double-firing.

tasks.title: Basic Delivery Radius Checker
tasks.description: Validate customer postcodes against delivery radius using geocoding.
tasks.completionNotes: Pizzapilot_Delivery_Checker class with Haversine distance calculation. postcodes.io geocoding (UK, free). AJAX endpoint for real-time validation. 30-day transient caching. Extensible via pizzapilot_geocode_postcode filter (Pro overrides with Google Maps). Both classic and block checkout validation.

tasks.title: Kitchen Order Interface
tasks.description: Admin dashboard showing orders grouped by time slot with completion checkboxes.
tasks.notes: Not implemented in either free or pro version. Requires admin page, order grouping by slot, completion toggles, and refresh functionality.

tasks.title: WooCommerce Integration
tasks.description: Display time slot info in order admin, emails, and customer views.
tasks.completionNotes: Order meta box on edit page showing delivery type + time. Custom 'Delivery Slot' column in orders list. Order status change handling (fires pizzapilot_slot_released on cancel/refund).
tasks.remaining: Email integration (slot info in order confirmation emails). Customer-facing order view display.

tasks.title: Pro Feature Teasers
tasks.description: Show disabled Pro features with upgrade prompts in free version UI.
tasks.completionNotes: Same-day toggle shown disabled with Pro upsell link. Helpers::pizzapilot_is_pro_active() detection. Extensive Pro hooks for settings, delivery, slots, item counting.
tasks.remaining: Visual badges/colors for Pro features. Kitchen UI teaser. Map feature teasers. Dedicated upgrade page.

tasks.title: Plugin Activation and Dependency Checks
tasks.description: Activation hooks for table creation, dependency checking, and default settings.
tasks.completionNotes: register_activation_hook creates DB table. register_deactivation_hook placeholder. uninstall.php exists.
tasks.remaining: WooCommerce dependency check on activation. Version migration/upgrade logic. Admin notices for missing dependencies.

tasks.title: Frontend Assets and Styling
tasks.description: CSS and JavaScript assets for checkout and admin interfaces.
tasks.completionNotes: Public JS fully functional (postcode checker with AJAX, debouncing, message display, WC Blocks support). Assets properly enqueued and localized.
tasks.remaining: Admin CSS (empty template). Public CSS (empty template). Responsive/accessibility considerations.

tasks.title: Order Display in WooCommerce Admin
tasks.description: Enhanced order list with slot column and filtering.
tasks.completionNotes: Custom meta box on order edit page. Delivery Slot column in orders list with shorthand time format.
tasks.remaining: Filtering orders by time slot. Quick view on hover.

tasks.title: Internationalization and Localization
tasks.description: Prepare plugin for translation with proper text domain usage.
tasks.completionNotes: Text domain 'pizzapilot' throughout. Pizzapilot_i18n class loads text domain. All strings wrapped with __(), esc_html__(), etc. POT template file exists in languages/.

tasks.title: Documentation and Help Resources
tasks.description: Contextual help tabs, tooltips, and getting started guide.
tasks.notes: No contextual help tabs, tooltips, or inline documentation built yet.
